reference: Hello, I have had a cold for the last two months. The cold has not shown an increase in its hold, as if it has reached an equilibrium with my body. I have completed the prescribed doses, but since there has not been much improvement, the doctor suggested taking a chest X-ray. It seems this problem is due to cough in my lungs that is not being expelled. Can I try Deriphyllin? What is your suggestion?
text: Hello, I have had it for the last two months. The cold has not shown an increase in its hold, as if it has reached an equilibrium with my body. I have completed the prescribed doses, but since not been much improvement, the doctor suggested taking a chest x-ray. It seems this problem is due to cough in my lungs that is not being expelled. Can I try Deraphilin? What is your suggestion?
